install.description: Install a module or project into the runtime.

options.path: Path to the project (default: current directory)

run.description: Run a previously installed project or module.

options.env: Environment variables or profile to use
options.watch: Watch files and restart on changes

vexp.description: Commands for working with .vexp project manifests (compile, validate).

veb.description: Display help information for commands. Use 'all' to display full dictionary.
